title: Hammer Havoc
description: A mod that adds a unique hammer to the game
body:
[![Discord](https://i.ibb.co/zPnkJRb/discord-dark.png)](https://discord.gg/baercraft) [![Kofi](https://i.ibb.co/TcMrMRf/kofi-dark.png)](https://ko-fi.com/subthy)
![Mod Description](https://i.ibb.co/2tmHr2Z/Hammer-Havoc.png)
Image transcription Transform your Minecraft mining experience with Hammer Havoc! This mod introduce powerful hammer that can dig out a 3x3 area with a single swing. Whether you're exploring caves, building large structures, or just want to speed up your resource gathering, Hammer Havoc has the perfect tool for you.
[**![Bisect](https://i.ibb.co/7NW2SY3/8d721697-200b-4168-81cd-f1daa8d8a680.png)**](https://bisecthosting.com/Subthy?r=HammerHavoc)
Other projects
